name: G Pen Melt
summary: G Pen Melt — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The G Pen Melt is a compact, high-performance concentrate vaporiser designed for users who want fast heating, strong flavour, and a simplified load-and-go workflow. The G Pen Melt is engineered specifically for concentrates, delivering dense vapour with minimal warm-up time. Its ceramic chamber and intuitive operation make it ideal for customers seeking a portable device that balances flavour, potency, and ease of use. The Melt leverages G Pen’s strong brand presence and consistent customer demand. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
